rationale: Acting on Review 1 produces the better PR: its first finding correctly identifies the non-idiomatic rw unfolding of IsUnipotent (lines 55-57) versus a one-line simp that the diff's own structure permits, while the second removes the dead, content-free projection theorem at line 73 (whose True field already satisfies itself). Review 2's blanket approval misses both, leaving inferior proof style and dead code.
